business_id.comment: ID of the associated business in Twitter

business_name.comment: Name of the associated business in Twitter

created_timestamp.comment: Date and time when the account was created

is_deleted.comment: Whether the account has been deleted

account_id.comment: ID of the account in Twitter

industry_type.name: industry_type
industry_type.comment: Industry type of the account in Twitter

account_name.name: account_name
account_name.comment: Name of the account in Twitter

timezone.name: timezone
timezone.comment: Timezone of the account in Twitter

updated_timestamp.name: updated_timestamp
updated_timestamp.comment: Date and time when the account was last updated

source_relation.comment: The source of the record, if the unioning functionality is being used.

metadata.name: stg_twitter_organic__organic_tweet_report
metadata.comment: Each record represents metrics about a tweet on a specific date.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: When the record was last synced by Fivetran.

account_id.name: account_id
account_id.comment: ID of the associated account in Twitter

app_clicks.name: app_clicks
app_clicks.comment: Number of clicks on app install campaigns

follows.name: follows
follows.comment: Number of follows as a result of the tweet

organic_tweet_id.name: organic_tweet_id
organic_tweet_id.comment: ID of the tweet in Twitter

poll_card_vote.name: poll_card_vote
poll_card_vote.comment: Number of votes on poll cards

qualified_impressions.name: qualified_impressions
qualified_impressions.comment: Number of qualified impressions on tweet

unfollows.name: unfollows
unfollows.comment: Number of unfollows as a result of the tweet

url_clicks.name: url_clicks
url_clicks.comment: Number of clicks on URLs in tweet

video_3_s_100_pct_views.name: video_3_s_100_pct_views
video_3_s_100_pct_views.comment: Total number of views where at least 3 seconds were played while 100% in view.

video_content_starts.name: video_content_starts
video_content_starts.comment: Number of times the video content started

video_cta_clicks.name: video_cta_clicks
video_cta_clicks.comment: Number of clicks on tweet call-to-actions

video_total_views.name: video_total_views
video_total_views.comment: Total number of views on video

video_views_100.name: video_views_100
video_views_100.comment: Total number of views where at least 100% of the video was viewed.

video_views_25.name: video_views_25
video_views_25.comment: Total number of views where at least 25% of the video was viewed.

video_views_50.name: video_views_50
video_views_50.comment: Total number of views where at least 50% of the video was viewed.

video_views_75.name: video_views_75
video_views_75.comment: Total number of views where at least 75% of the video was viewed.

source_relation.name: source_relation
source_relation.comment: The source of the record, if the unioning functionality is being used.

metadata.name: stg_twitter_organic__tweet
metadata.comment: Each record represents a tweet in Twitter

account_id.comment: ID of the associated account in Twitter

card_uri.name: card_uri
card_uri.comment: URI of the associated card in Twitter

created_timestamp.comment: Date and time when the tweet was created

favorite_count.comment: Number of times the tweet has been favorited

favorited.name: favorited
favorited.comment: Whether the tweet has been favorited

followers.name: followers
followers.comment: Number of followers the tweet generated

tweet_text.name: tweet_text
tweet_text.comment: The full text of the tweet

organic_tweet_id.name: organic_tweet_id
organic_tweet_id.comment: The ID of the tweet in Twitter

in_reply_to_screen_name.name: in_reply_to_screen_name
in_reply_to_screen_name.comment: Screen name the tweet is in reply to

in_reply_to_status_id.name: in_reply_to_status_id
in_reply_to_status_id.comment: Status ID the tweet is in reply to

in_reply_to_user_id.name: in_reply_to_user_id
in_reply_to_user_id.comment: User ID the tweet is in reply to

media_key.name: media_key
media_key.comment: Key of associated media in media library table

retweet_count.name: retweet_count
retweet_count.comment: Number of times the tweet has been retweeted

retweeted.name: retweeted
retweeted.comment: Whether the tweet has been retweeted

truncated.name: truncated
truncated.comment: Whether the tweet has been truncated

user_id.name: user_id
user_id.comment: The ID of the user who tweeted the tweet

source_relation.comment: The source of the record, if the unioning functionality is being used.
